title: commelina hispida
intro: Commelina hispida, also known as hairy windmill or hairy dragon's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Commelina hispida include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of pain and infection. Herbal preparations of Commelina hispida can be made by drying and grinding the leaves, and then using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
